small.description: Great for small stickers on phones and helmets.

medium.description: Perfect for tumblers, notebooks, and diaries.

large.description: Ideal for prominent surfaces and product labels.

extraLarge.description: Perfect size for cars, boxes, and tool cases.

madeToday.title: Made today, shipped tomorrow
madeToday.text: Fast production after proof approval with predictable delivery.

proofReview.title: Online Proof Review
proofReview.text: Approve your digital proof before we run the job.

durability.title: Outstanding durability
durability.text: Water-resistant, long-lasting finish for daily use.

timeless.title: Timeless Perfection
timeless.text: Vibrant colors from premium printing and thick material built to resist fading from sun and heat. Enjoy long-lasting quality from the moment you apply it.

quickStick.title: Quick to stick, easy to peel!
quickStick.text: Applies smoothly and peels cleanly without residue. Strong adhesive protects surfaces and removes with minimal effort.

preciseCut.title: Precisely cut to match the design
preciseCut.text: Upload your logo or artwork and we cut with precision around every shape, preserving small details and clean edges.

reviews.headline: 499 Client Reviews, Satisfaction Guaranteed.
reviews.description: Real reviews, real photos, real satisfaction. See how our customers love their products.

glass.title: Perfect for Our Glass Door!
glass.text: We put our logo sticker on our glass door and it looks amazing. Vibrant colors, precise cut, smooth adhesion.

bike.title: Vibrant and Durable on My Bike
bike.text: Got a custom sticker for my motorcycle and it fits perfectly. Colors are vibrant and the cut is precise.

quality.title: Top-Quality Stickers Every Time!
quality.text: I'm impressed with this sticker brand. Designs are vibrant, cuts are precise, and they stick cleanly.

holo.title: Eye-Catching Hologram Effect
holo.text: Hologram colors shift beautifully under light. Thick, durable, and no residue after peeling.
